name.en: The End the Mad Fiend Deity of Despair
name.ja: <ruby>絶<rt>ぜつ</rt></ruby><ruby>望<rt>ぼう</rt></ruby><ruby>狂<rt>きょう</rt></ruby><ruby>魔<rt>ま</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt>しん</rt></ruby>ジ・エンド

requirement.en: Shuffle 6 monsters from your Graveyard into the Deck.

effect.en: Destroy up to 2 cards on your opponent's field. Then, you can Special Summon 1 monster from your opponent's Graveyard face-up to your field.

materials.en: "Dead End the Mad Fiend of Despair" + "Bad End the Mad Fiend of Despair"
